titleStmt.title: SII 17.549: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 549. (A.R. No. 506 of 1904.) AGATTIYĀṈPAḶḶI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in Agastyēśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., 31st year, Ṛishabha, Sunday śu. [9], Uttiram, correspond to 1299 A.D., May 10, ·18; ·89.

This epigraph records the grant of 5 vēli of land, made free of taxes to god Tiruvagattiyāṉpaḷḷi-uḍaiyār in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu, in Umbar-vaḷanāḍu alias Taraṇimuḻud uḍaiya-vaḷanāḍu, for the celebration of a festival in the month of Vaikāśi, on the last day of which occurs the star Hasta, for the health of the king by the Nāṭṭavar of Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu. The land was called Bhāgampiriyāda-nallūr after the name of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmar tiri
puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekara
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1vatu Iṣavanā
yaṟṟu pūṟuva [pakṣattu] yum
nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttira
ttu nāḷ Umpar vaḷanāṭāṉa taraṇimu
ḻutuṭai vaḷanāṭṭu kuṉṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭai
yār Uṭaiyār
koyil taṇ kuṉṟūr
nāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom nāṭṭiṟaiyili paṇṇi
kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyanāṟku perumāḷ tiru
meṉi kalliyāṇa tirumeṉi yākaveṇum Eṉ
ṟu vaikāci mātattu Attam tittamāka nāṅkaḷ ka
ṇṭa tiruvaikāci tirunāḷukku Uṭaṟkoḷ paṭi
veṇṭum vaḻikai mutalukku nāṅkaḷ mutalaṭaṅ
ka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṉṉāṭ
ṭu perumpulattu Aḷavākuṭiyiruppu Iṉṉāyaṉāṟ
ku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭut
tu Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattāl pākam piriyāta nal
lūr Eṉṉum tirunāmattāl veṟupirinta nilamāy
nāṅkaḷ mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nila
ttukku kiḻpāṟkellai perumpulattūr nilattukku
Ivvūril Uṭaiyār tiruvakattiyāṉpaḷḷi
Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam tiruvatikāṇikku meṟk
kum tenpārkkellai Ātaṉūr kulottuṅkaco
ḻanallūr nilattukkum perumpulattu Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatā
ṉam tiruviḷakkupuṟattukkum Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam ti
runāmattukkāṇi puravarinallūrkku vaṭakkum
melpararkkellai Ātaṉūr kulottuṅkaco
ḻanallūr nilattukkum perumpulattu Iṉṉā
yaṉār tevatāṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapākkel
lai perumpulattūr nilattukkum Uṭaiyār tiruma
ṟaikkāvuṭaiyār tevatāṉam perumpulattu
nampiyār Uḷār viḷākattukkum Uṭaiyār tiruva
kattiyāṉpaḷḷi Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam perumpulat
tu tirumantirapuvaṉakappuṟattukkuRead tirumantirap poṉakappuṟattukku.teṟkum Āka Icai
nta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa pottakappaṭi ni
lam 5- li Iṉṉilam Aiy velikkum varum nel kaṭamai
kācu kaṭamai kuṭimai meṟpāṭikāval Āyavarkam nā
ṭṭu vari Ūr vari Uḷḷiṭṭu varum kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭa
Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭile Eṟṟi Iṟuttu Iṉ
ṉilam Aiyveliyum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyi
liyāka cantira Ātittavaṟ celvatāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭu
ttu kalveṭṭi kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvakattiyāṉpa
ḷḷi Uṭaiyār koyil Ātitaṇṭecuratevaṟku kuṉṟūr nāṭ
ṭu nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭikkivai Iṉṉāṭṭuk kaṇakku
nūṇūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṉṟūruṭaiyāṉ
maku r piriyātāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kollai Uṭaiyāṉ vaḷava
taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kollai Uṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉapperumāṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟucci Uṭaiyāṉ miṉavataraiyaṉ Ippaṭik
ku Ivai kuṟicci Uṭaiyāṉ Irācarāca muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
kollai Uṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ � taṟa matittāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Arai
paḷḷi ṉ
ku Ivai tta mu raiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ce
lluṭaiyāṉ A ppaṭikku Ivai Ātaṉūruṭaiyāṉ
n teṉṉavaṉ kku Ivai tiṭṭaiceri Uṭaiyā
ṉ veḷāṉ tiṭṭaicceri Uṭaiyāṉ Uṭai
yāṉ Ottaṟu kku Ivai neṭumpaṉaṅkāvuṭaiyāṉ
rācanārāyaṇa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koṭumalūr kiḻa
vaṉ kā yāṉa ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai perumpulamuṭaiyāṉ
kka ciramuṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai maturai Uṭaiyāṉ
kaṇṇaṉ ka ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koṭummallūr kiḻavaṉ ceḻi
yataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pallavatarai
yaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai raiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 17.549 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
